name: industrysignal
description: IndustrySignal — B2B intelligence platform for Czech industry. Monorepo root.

scripts.clean:cache: rm -rf .turbo apps/*/.next apps/*/.turbo apps/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/*/.turbo packages/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/*/dist
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d db && docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'until pg_isready -U industrysignal -d industrysignal >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done'
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm --filter @industrysignal/portal e2e
